days.saints_uk: Початок Успенського посту; 🕃 Похід із чесним Деревом чесного і животворного Хреста; Свв. сімох мучеників Макавеїв, і матері їх Соломії, і старця Єлеазара; Преподобного отця нашого Альфонса Лігуорі
days.saints_en: Procession of the Precious Wood of the Precious and Life-Giving Cross. Sts. Seven Maccabee Martyrs, their Mother Solomone & Elder Eleazar. Ven. Alphonsus Liguori. Beginning of the Dormition Fast
days.troparion_en: O Lord, save Your people, / and bless Your inheritance! / Grant victories to the Orthodox Christians / over their adversaries. / And by virtue of the Cross, / preserve Your habitation!

days.saints_uk: Неділя 10-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 1. Єв. 10.; 🕃 Перенесення мощів св. первомученика й архидиякона Стефана.
days.saints_en: 9th Sunday after Pentecost. Translation of the Relics of the Holy Protomartyr and Archdeacon Stephen
days.troparion_en: Your relics have risen from the depths of the earth, / like a treasury for the immortal life of all of creation. / The Church, rejoicing in the grace that she receives from them, / duteously honors yo

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 11-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Преподобних отців наших Ісаакія, Далмата й Фавста.
days.saints_en: Ven. Isaac, Dalmatus & Faustus
days.troparion_en: O God of our Fathers, / always act with kindness towards us; / take not Your mercy from us, / but guide our lives in peace / through the prayers of Venerable Isaac, Dalmatus, and Faustus.

days.saints_uk: Свв. сімох отроків, що в Ефесі; Святої преподобномучениці Євдокії
days.saints_en: Sts. Seven Youths of Ephesus. Ven. Protomartyr Eudocia
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received their incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the power

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Передсвяття Переображення Господа нашого Ісуса Христа; Св. мученика Євсигнія
days.saints_en: Forefeast of the Transfiguration of our Lord Jesus Christ. St. Martyr Eusignius

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Святе Переображення Господа Бога і Спаса нашого Ісуса Христа
days.saints_en: Holy Transfiguration of our Lord, God and Savior Jesus Christ
days.troparion_en: You were transfigured on the mountain, O Christ God, / revealing Your glory to Your disciples as far as they could bear it. / Let Your everlasting Light also shine upon us sinners, / through the praye

days.saints_uk: Св. преподобномученика Дометія
days.saints_en: Ven. Protomartyr Dometius
days.troparion_en: Preparing yourself through prayer and fasting on the mountain, / you destroyed the hosts of spiritual enemies with the weapon of the Cross. / And then courageously preparing yourself for martyrdom, /

days.saints_uk: Св. Еміліяна, ісповідника, єпископа Кизицького.
days.saints_en: St. Emilian the Confessor, Bishop of Cyzicus
days.troparion_en: In confessing the Faith you proclaimed Orthodox doctrine / and were unjustly exiled for rebuking the wicked Emperor.  /  O righteous and glorious Emilian,  /  the boast of Kyzikos,  / entreat Christ G

days.saints_uk: Неділя 11-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 2. Єв. 11.; 🕂 Св. апостола Матія
days.saints_en: 10th Sunday after Pentecost. St. Apostle Matthias
days.troparion_en: O Holy Apostle Matthias, / intercede with the merciful God / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 12-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Св. мученика й архидиякона Лаврентія
days.saints_en: St. Martyr and Archdeacon Laurence
days.troparion_en: Victorious martyr of Christ our God, / by the sign of the Cross you gave sight to the blind; / you distributed the riches of the Church to the poor; / you were tried by fire and no evil was found in y

days.saints_uk: Св. мученика й архидиякона Євпла
days.saints_en: St. Martyr and Archdeacon Euplus
days.troparion_en: As a holy deacon and righteous minister of the Church of Christ, / you contended superbly. / You sailed over the sea of many torments and afflictions, / O all-blessed Euplus. / Guide us into the haven

days.saints_uk: Свв. мучеників Фотія й Аникити
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Photius & Anicetas
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyrs Anicetus and Photius, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shat

days.saints_uk: Віддання Преображення.; Преподобного отця нашого Максима Ісповідника
days.saints_en: Ven. Maximus the Confessor. Leave-taking of the Transfiguration
days.troparion_en: You were Transfigured on the Mount, O Christ God, / revealing Your glory to Your disciples as far as they could bear it. / Let Your everlasting Light shine upon us sinners! / Through the prayers of th

days.saints_uk: 🕂 Перенесення чесних мощів преподобного Теодосія, ігумена Печерського; 🕃 Передсвяття Успіння Пресвятої Богородиці; Св. пророка Міхея.
days.saints_en: Translation of the Relics of Ven. Theodosius, Hegumen of the Caves. Forefeast of the Dormition of the Most Holy Theotokos. St. Prophet Micah
days.troparion_en: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theod

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Успіння Пресвятої Владичиці нашої Богородиці і Приснодіви Марії
days.saints_en: Dormition of our Most Holy Lady, the Theotokos and Ever-Virgin Mary
days.troparion_en:
In giving birth, you preserved your virginity,  /  and in falling asleep you did not forsake the world, O
Theotokos.  /  You passed into life as the Mother of Life,  / and by your prayers, you delive

days.saints_uk: Неділя 12-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 3. Єв. 1.; 🕃 Перенесення з Едеси до Царгороду нерукотворного образа Господа Бога і Спаса нашого Ісуса Христа, названого святим обрусом; Св. мученика Діомида
days.saints_en: 11th Sunday after Pentecost. Translation from Edessa to Constantinople of the Not-Made-by-Hands Image of our Lord, God and Savior Jesus Christ
days.troparion_en: We venerate Your most pure image, O Good One, / and ask forgiveness of our transgressions, O Christ God. / Of Your own will You were pleased to ascend the Cross in the flesh / to deliver Your creature

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 13-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Св. мученика Мирона.
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Myron
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyr, Myron, O Lord, / through his suffering has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless b

days.saints_uk: 🕂 Спомин освячення Патріаршого собору Воскресіння Христового в Києві; Свв. мучеників Флора й Лавра; Службу свв. мчч. Флора і Лавра співаємо на Повечер'ї.
days.saints_en: Commemoration of the Consecration of the Patriarchal Cathedral of the Resurrection of Christ in Kyiv. Sts. Martyrs Florus & Laurus
days.troparion_en: Let us praise as is meet, O you faithful, / the most comely, radiant and divinely wise martyrs: / Most blessed Florus and all venerable Laurus, / who proclaimed to all the uncreated Trinity. / Sufferi

days.saints_uk: Св. мученика Андрія Стратопедарха – сотника, і тих, що з ним.
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Andrew Stratelates and those with him
days.troparion_en: You renounced the glory of earthly rank / and inherited the kingdom of heaven; / you adorned your incorruptible crown as with beautiful stones. / You led an army of martyrs to Christ, / and with the a

days.saints_uk: Св. пророка Самуїла.
days.saints_en: St. Prophet Samuel
days.troparion_en: You arrived by your mother's prayers, bearing the name “God has heard.” /  You were called by the Lord from infancy, O revered Prophet Samuel,  /  you shepherded the rebellious people well and became

days.saints_uk: Св. апостола Тадея; Святої мучениці Васси.
days.saints_en: St. Apostle Thaddaeus. St. Martyr Bassa
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyr Bassa and her sons, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shatter

days.saints_uk: Св. мученика Агатоніка і тих, що з ним; Блаженного священномученика Симеона Лукача.
days.saints_en: St. Martyr Agathonicus and those with him. Blessed Hieromartyr Symeon Lukach
days.troparion_en: Your holy martyr Agathonicus and his companions, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, /

days.saints_uk: Неділя 13-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 4. Єв. 2.; Віддання Успіння Пресвятої Богородиці; Св. мученика Луппа; Св. священномученика Іринея, єпископа Ліонського
days.saints_en: 12th Sunday after Pentecost. St. Martyr Lupus. Hieromartyr Irenaeus, Bishop of Lyon. Leave-taking of the Dormition of the Most Holy Theotokos
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “You were lifted up...”)
As a wise Hierarch bearing the name of peace,  / you proclaimed the Gospel in the world, Most Blessed and Holy Irenaeus,  / and you contested vigorously for Christ;

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 14-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; Св. священномученика Євтиха.
days.saints_en: Hieromartyr Eutychius
days.troparion_en: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, / you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching th

days.saints_uk: 🕃 Повернення мощів св. апостола Вартоломея; Св. апостола Тита
days.saints_en: Return of the Relics of St. Apostle Bartholomew. St. Apostle Titus
days.troparion_en: Holy Apostles Bartholomew and Titus, / entreat the merciful God, / to grant our souls forgiveness of transgressions.

days.saints_uk: Свв. мучеників Адріана й Наталії
days.saints_en: Sts. Martyrs Adrian & Natalia
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “Your confession of the Divine Faith...”)
You regarded the Faith as an imperishable treasure, O most blessed one,  / abandoning the ungodliness of your fathers, and walking in the footsteps

days.saints_uk: Преподобного отця нашого Пімена; Блаженних преподобномучениць Лаврентії Герасимів і Олімпії Біди
days.saints_en: Ven. Pimen. Blessed Venerable Martyrs Laurentia Herasymiv & Olympia Bida
days.troparion_en: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Pimen

days.saints_uk: Собор преподобних отців Печерських, що спочивають у дальніх печерах; Преподобного Мойсея Мурина; Св. отця нашого Августина, єпископа Іппонського; Св. мученика Гебре Михаїла, пресвітера ефіопського.
days.saints_en: Synaxis of the Ven. Fathers of the Kyiv Caves Who Repose in the Far Caves. Ven. Moses the Ethiopian. St. Augustine, Bishop of Hippo. St. Martyr Gebre Michael, Ethiopian Presbyter
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: “When the stone had been sealed...”)
You were shown to be a citizen of the desert, / an Angel in the flesh, and a wonderworker, O Moses, our God-bearing Father. / By fasting, vigil, and pra

days.saints_uk: 🕀 Усікновення чесної голови чесного і славного пророка, предтечі і хрестителя Івана
days.saints_en: Beheading of the Precious Head of the Honorable and Glorious Prophet, Forerunner and Baptist John
days.troparion_en: The memory of the righteous is celebrated with hymns of praise, / but the Lord’s testimony is sufficient for you, O Forerunner. / You were shown in truth to be the most honorable of the prophets, / fo

days.saints_uk: Неділя 14-та по Зісланні Святого Духа. Глас 5. Єв. 3.; Свв. отців наших патріархів Царгородських: Олександра, Івана й Павла Нового.
days.saints_en: 13th Sunday after Pentecost. Sts. Patriarchs of Constantinople: Alexander, John & Paul the New
days.troparion_en:
(Podoben: "Go quickly before us...")
Christ, the God over all,1  / has appointed you as a venerable shepherd of His Church, O Godly-wise Alexander, /  a light upon the lampstand,2 a faithful steward,

days.saints_uk: Тиждень 15-ий по Зісланні Святого Духа.; 🕂 Положення чесного пояса Пресвятої Владичиці нашої Богородиці
days.saints_en: Placing of the Precious Cincture of our Most Holy Lady the Theotokos
days.troparion_en: Ever-Virgin Theotokos, protectress of mankind, / you have given your people a powerful legacy: / the robe and sash of your most honored body which remained / incorrupt throughout your seedless childbe
